title: flemingia macrophylla var. nana
intro: Flemingia macrophylla var. nana, also known as the Dwarf Flemingia or Dwarf Java Tea, is a small shrub-like plant native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Flemingia macrophylla var. nana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even exhibit antibacterial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
